candidate: L9 EMPIRICAL PEAD EVENT-VOLUME + power-shortfall bound. SYNTHESIS/feasibility track: NO new edge, NO new data acquisition, NO optimization. Uses the EXISTING monthly earnings panel (data/snapshots/earnings_dates.parquet) + the price panel to replace L8's ASSUMED daily-PEAD arrival rate (~120/yr) with the REAL liquid earnings event volume, and bounds whether a day-stamped daily-PEAD test could reach the L8 n_required band.
purpose: L8 showed daily-PEAD is the only power-reachable event class IF its effect sits in the observed band, using an ESTIMATED ~120 disclosure-dates/yr. L9 grounds that estimate empirically: count the actual liquid, SUE-testable earnings events available in the lab window, and bound the month->day independent-observation multiplier. Output a data-backed reachability statement (does real BIST liquid earnings volume clear n_required = 95..759 for |t|=2?).
inputs_FROZEN: data/snapshots/earnings_dates.parquet (24937 events, 195 announce-months 2008-2025; 10131 SUE-nonnull; month-resolution, look-ahead-safe consume_from_month)

method_FROZEN.window: lab window only: fiscal_year >= 2019 (matches the price panel and L3).
method_FROZEN.testable_subset: SUE non-null (the events a SUE-sorted PEAD test can actually use).
method_FROZEN.liquidity: per (symbol, announce_month): trailing-63-trading-day median value_tl as of the last trading day on-or-before announce_month end; LIQUID iff >= 1.0e7 TL (D-205 absolute threshold). Look-ahead-safe (trailing only).
method_FROZEN.counts: total testable events, LIQUID testable events, distinct announce-months (month-resolution date-cluster proxy), all also per-year.
method_FROZEN.month_to_day_multiplier: month-resolution clusters each announce-month into ONE date; day-stamping splits a month's filings across distinct announce-DATES. Bound distinct announce-DATES per month as min(events_in_month, TRADING_DAYS_PER_MONTH=21). Sum over the window = bounded independent date-clusters a daily-PEAD test could obtain. This is a CEILING (assumes filings spread across distinct days up to the trading-day cap).
method_FROZEN.reachability: compare bounded daily date-clusters (total and per-year) against the L8 n_required band [95, 759] for |t|=2. Report years-to-band at the empirical per-year rate.

honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.summary: Expect the real liquid SUE-testable volume to be on the order of ~150-250 liquid names x ~4 quarters ~ several-hundred events/yr, spreading (day-stamped) across ~60-100 distinct announce-dates/yr. That should CONFIRM L8's ~120/yr estimate to within a factor of ~2 and clear the n_required band (95-759) within ~1-4 years -- i.e., daily-PEAD remains the only power-reachable class, now on EMPIRICAL not assumed volume. HONEST caveat: month-resolution caps the date-cluster count to a BOUND, not the true daily count; and SUE coverage (~41% of events) shrinks the testable set. Possible surprise: if liquid+SUE coverage is thin (<~80 events/yr), the reachability horizon stretches and the daily-PEAD case weakens.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.most_likely_verdict: DESCRIPTIVE-VOLUME-VIEW. A data-grounded feasibility number, not an edge. NO celebration; result recorded whatever it is.
